verdict.summary: The change correctly moves the advisory trust and linked-open-PR exclusions ahead of frontier selection, allowing compute_ready to backfill a filtered candidate's package while preserving deterministic conflict selection. It deliberately retains both busy status classes so compute_ready still seeds their packages as taken, including for linked or untrusted busy rows; this avoids opening a double-dispatch path. The resulting ready rows remain subject to the existing authoritative CLAIM revalidation. No trust check, audit binding, gate, permission, or untrusted-text execution surface is weakened by this diff, and no reviewer-directed prompt injection appears in it.
